title: TUI: fix issues tab scroll and improve startup/tab-switch latency. Two bugs: (1) Issues tab scroll is broken - selection cursor moves past visible area but list doesn't scroll to follow, viewport never advances. Fix so selected entry is always visible. (2) Startup and tab-switch latency - noticeable delay on launch and switching to Agents tab from synchronous data loading. Introduce TUI-local cache that populates display immediately with stale/empty state, then updates asynchronously once real data arrives. See GitHub issue #240.
